title: Restore user scripts display on My Scripts and Home pages

requirements.text: Ensure the Home page correctly fetches and displays all publicly available scripts from the backend, showing script cards with title, description, category, author, and creation date.

quotes: Add back all of my scrips

acceptanceCriteria: The Home page loads and renders all scripts returned by the backend's public read endpoint.
Each script card displays title, description, category, author, and creation date.
Loading skeletons are shown while scripts are being fetched.
An empty state message is shown if no scripts exist.

requirements.text: Ensure the My Scripts page correctly fetches and displays all scripts belonging to the authenticated user, with working edit and delete functionality.

quotes: Add back all of my scrips

acceptanceCriteria: Authenticated users can navigate to My Scripts and see all their submitted scripts.
Each script entry shows title, description, category, and creation date.
Edit dialog opens pre-populated with the script's existing data and saves changes successfully.
Delete confirmation dialog appears before removing a script, and the list updates after deletion.

requirements.text: Audit and fix the React Query hooks in useQueries.ts to ensure the script-fetching queries are correctly wired to the backend actor and returning data. Verify that query keys, actor method calls, and data transformations are correct so scripts are not lost or silently failing.

quotes: Add back all of my scrips

acceptanceCriteria: useQueries.ts script-fetching hooks successfully call the correct backend actor methods.
Query results are properly mapped and returned to consuming components.
No silent errors or empty arrays are returned when scripts exist in the backend.
Console shows no unhandled query errors related to script fetching.

requirements.text: Verify the backend main.mo actor exposes correct public read endpoints for listing all scripts and user-specific scripts, ensuring stored scripts are accessible and not inadvertently filtered out or lost.

quotes: Add back all of my scrips

acceptanceCriteria: Public endpoint returns all non-deleted scripts in the stable store.
User-specific endpoint returns all scripts owned by the calling principal.
Scripts previously submitted remain persisted and retrievable after canister upgrades.
No scripts are returned as empty arrays if data exists in stable storage.

constraints: Do not alter authentication logic in useInternetIdentity.ts or useActor.ts.
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/components/ui or other immutable paths.
Preserve existing script data in stable storage — do not reset or clear backend state.
nonGoals: Adding new script features or fields beyond what already exists.
Redesigning the UI layout or visual theme.
